flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 6 pp at Dordt University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (65.3% vs 71.0%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Dordt University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Dordt University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 (1.4k → 1.6k).
